reviews.author: Mark Tobin
reviews.text: A short steep and winding drive from Cassis brings you to this beautiful Mediterranean panorama.

reviews.author: Barry Belford
reviews.text: Incredible panoramic view of Cassis. On a sunny day the blues are spectacular.

reviews.author: MAXIME LE PAPE
reviews.text: 卡西斯悬崖气势磅礴，景色令人叹为观止。“山脊公路”（Route des Crêtes）视野极佳，尤其是在日落时分，更是美不胜收。这里是散步和欣赏壮丽自然风光的绝佳去处。
